abilities: Let's see who will be next.
Where could my dance partner be?
Won't you come out for me?
You can hide, but you cannot escape.
You can't hide from me forever.
You should watch where you're going.
No one can hide from my sight. (self and friendly)
chatter: After the trigger pull lies a blissful eternity-- until the shot connects.
Do not get in my way.
I prefer to work alone. But I suppose you will do.
I smell blood in the air.
Wherever they hide, we will dig them out.
It's time to spin my web.
Who will my web ensnare today?
Everything is going according to plan.
We are winning. Keep it that way.
Victory is so close, I can feel it.
Forget the past, victory begins here and now.
I don't fail. We turn this around now.
We'll turn the tables on them.
Don't let your guard down until the end.
We must win. There is no other option.
I've been waiting for a challenge.
Time to teach these bugs some manners.
And yet, we wiped them out. (eliminated during Team Kill)
How many did I take with me? Enough. (eliminated with Kill Streak)
His brother should've finished the job. (eliminated by Genji or Hanzo )
Finally, a worthy opponent. (eliminated by another Widowmaker )
And this is why you hire a professional.
The pawn can become the queen.
You must like having me around.
call-outs: Almost there. Don't let go of the defense.
Keep the defense up for a little longer.
They don't have much time left.
There is no time. We attack now.
eliminations: Fall to rust. (eliminating Omnics or Genji )
Our alliance is at an end. (eliminating any Talon member)
Spiders are solitary creatures. (eliminating any Talon member)
There goes your other eye. (eliminating Ana , Reinhardt , or Torbjorn )
The world's greatest sniper... formerly. (eliminating Ana )
Out with the old. (eliminating Ana , Reinhardt , Soldier: 76 , Reaper or Torbjörn )
Your steps are clumsy, girl. (eliminating Anran )
Little girls have no place on the battlefield. (eliminating D.Va , Brigitte , Juno , Kiriko , Pharah or Tracer )
Fraternité or death, my friend. (eliminating Doomfist )
The hunter becomes the hunted. (eliminating Freja )
I prefer hunting at sundown. (eliminating Illari )
Your light has gone out. (eliminating Illari )
This is not a zoo. (eliminating Junkrat , Roadhog , Winston or Wrecking Ball )
Finally. The silver tongue falls silent. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Large targets are such guilty pleasures. (eliminating Orisa , Roadhog , Reinhardt , Winston or Doomfist )
Someone, get him some shoes... (eliminating Sigma )
You can run, but the venom will catch you.
Your moment of triumph... tainted. (while enemy uses ultimate)
I don't like to be crowded. (eliminating an enemy in close range)
You thought me weak up close? *chuckle* (eliminating an enemy in close range)
I was always graceful in the air. (eliminating an enemy while airborne)
Perfection in flight. (eliminating an enemy while airborne)
*chuckle* Down to earth. (eliminating an airborne enemy)
Flew right into my web. (eliminating an airborne enemy)
Not so lofty now. (eliminating an airborne enemy)
What goes up... (eliminating an airborne enemy)
No-no, I'll come to you. (eliminating an airborne enemy whilst airborne)
Run far, run fast; it does not matter. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Distance is no obstacle to my accuracy. (long-range elimination)
Don't turn your back on me. (eliminating an enemy looking away)
No, no. I insist. (eliminating a resurrected player Widowmaker previously killed)
That is why I am the best. (eliminating enemy using ultimate)
Your special technique looks adorable from a distance. (long range elimination of enemy using ultimate)
You always jump at a chance to make a fool of yourself. (eliminating Baptiste using Exo Boots )
*sigh* What did I say about charging in? (eliminating a Mauga using Overrun)
*chuckle* Death from above. (eliminating Pharah while airborne using Grappling Hook)
You know nothing of justice. (eliminating Pharah using Barrage )
No, Reyes. That was not the move. (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom )
That ends now. (eliminating Sojourn using Overclock )
Keep your filthy subroutines away from me. (eliminating Sombra while Hacked)
Your leaping grows tiresome. (eliminating Winston using Jump Pack )
Don't use my tricks against me. (eliminating a Widowmaker using Infra-Sight )
No one could hit that shot but me. (eliminating a Widowmaker using Grappling Hook )
This bodybuilder makes it far too easy. (eliminating an enemy caught in Graviton Surge )
This almost makes it too easy. (eliminating an enemy while using Infra-Sight )
No one can hide. Not even you. (eliminating Sombra while using Infra-Sight )
It's a wonderful day to die.
Never disturb a spider in her web.
You should have watched your back.
Do you learn only by example?
It's dangerous to get close to me.
That's what I think of your theatrics. (eliminating an enemy using their ultimate)
I admire your taste for blood.
I knew there was a reason I kept you around.
You are not as useless as I expected.
Not bad, for second best. (to Ana )
Talon shows no mercy. (to Talon members)
interactions: Ana : I heard Talon failed another mission. Going soft? Widowmaker : Do not speak to me unless you wish to lose your other eye. Ana : I'd still be the better shot.
Ana : Gérard was a fool to love someone like you. Widowmaker : You don't know anything about him.
Ashe: Time to settle who's the best shot. Widowmaker: There is no competition. I was trained by the best. Ashe: And I was trained by the West. Widowmaker: * sigh * Americans .
Ashe: That rifle is a fine piece of work. Looks a little unwieldy, though. Widowmaker : Perhaps, in the hands of an amateur.
Widowmaker : Brave of you to show your face after what happened in Monte Cristi . Baptiste : Well, it is a pretty good face.
Baptiste : Look, I promise I won't spill any of Talon's secrets. Widowmaker : Do you know what happened to the last man I trusted? Baptiste : You know what, that's fine. Keep chasing me.
Baptiste On a Team with Only Male Heroes
(one of two): Doomfist : You're coming with us, Augustin. Reaper : You're coming with us, Augustin. Baptiste : Why won't you leave me alone? Widowmaker : You're lucky. I just wanted to kill you.
Widowmaker : You're lucky you're a robot. Bastion : (confused beeps) Widowmaker : That was not an invitation to talk to me.
Brigitte : Trust me, everyone. With Bastion on our side, this is going to go great! Bastion : *sheepish beeps* Widowmaker : *sigh* We're doomed. Brigitte : Well, I'm happy to have you.

Domina : Do you still perform, Lacroix? I dare say, you'd be captivating on a stage. Widowmaker : Every kill is a performance. Domina : Precisely my point! The public is simply dying to see you at work.
Doomfist : Cover me. Widowmaker : When have I not?
Widowmaker : You claim you are skilled. That remains to be seen. D.Va : What's that? You're hiding so far in the backline, I can barely hear you!
Widowmaker : Ah, if it isn't Maximilien 's new pet. Freja : What? Jealous he went with an outside hire for once? Widowmaker : *laughs* Not at all. He only bothers me with important matters.
Hazard : You know, if you really wanted to commit to the whole spider bit, you'd get some extra legs. Widowmaker : That sounds... horrifying. Hazard : Sure, like you aren't already a monster.
Hazard : How much did that skin mod cost you? Widowmaker : More than you'd be willing to pay.
Illari : You have killed so many. How do you live with yourself? Widowmaker : I stopped being weak. You should do the same.
Widowmaker : Poor girl. There are ways to numb your pain. Illari : That feels wrong... Would I even be the same person? Widowmaker : Of course not. You would be stronger.
Junker Queen : How many widows have you made, roughly? Widowmaker : I do not keep track. Junker Queen : Well, I'm pretty sure I'm ahead.
Juno : Oh, moons! You are purple! Are you feeling unwell? Widowmaker : *sighs* I am now. Juno : Do not panic! I will call a medic! Oh, but I am a medic! Uh, I will call another medic!
Widowmaker : What experience do you possibly bring to this mission? Kiriko : Last week, my friends and I sank a Hashimoto party boat. Widowmaker : So... nothing. *sigh*
Widowmaker : You're making too much noise. Lúcio : It's not noise, it's music! Widowmaker : Very well, you're making too much music.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Widowmaker : The black widow. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : Admit it, spider: you think I'm all right. Widowmaker : Well, you are loud, boorish, and annoying. Mauga : ..."But"? Widowmaker : I was done talking.
Widowmaker : You could not save your friends... what make you think you can save the world? Mei : I trust my team like I trust my family. I hope some day... you can do the same.
Moira : You've been distant lately, Lacroix... Widowmaker : By your design. Moira : Pondering anything unusual? Dangerous? Widowmaker : No. Never.
Widowmaker : Our foes make such a nuisance of themselves. Moira : Is that an emotion I detect, Lacroix?
Ramattra: Tell me, is it true you never miss? Widowmaker: Everyone misses. Ramattra: That wasn't an answer. Widowmaker: I don't owe you one.
Widowmaker : Are you ever tempted to contact your wife ? Reaper : No. Widowmaker : Afraid she would try to kill you? Reaper : I'd be surprised if she didn't.
Widowmaker : I'm taking leave after this mission. Reaper : Marital problems? Widowmaker : Not lately .
Reinhardt : One day, you'll pay for all the crimes you've committed! Widowmaker : You're less handsome when you talk.
Widowmaker : All the armor in the world can't save you from a well-placed bullet. Reinhardt : How do you think your fancy jumpsuit would fare against my hammer?
Sojourn : You look familiar. Widowmaker : You don't. Sojourn : You were at my induction, standing with Gérard ... Amélie? Widowmaker : Call me by that name again, and you will share his fate.
Widowmaker: Was the lily on Gérard 's grave yours? Soldier: 76: You know we were close. Widowmaker: Not close enough to know he preferred roses.
Widowmaker : Gérard spoke of you often. Soldier: 76 : Did he say I warned him about you? Widowmaker : Yes. He thought it was funny.
Sombra : How about we call a truce? Widowmaker : How about I call a mortician?

Sombra : Not like I didn't warn the boss, but... hard to believe Vendetta 's already starting a war. Widowmaker : She may be extreme, but I cannot fault her for knowing where she stands. Sombra : Are you kidding me? She blew up Overwatch . Widowmaker : She took action. That is more than Doomfist can claim.

Sombra : So you didn't want to stick around and see what a mess V makes of the place either, huh? Widowmaker : No. I know a sinking ship when I see one. Sombra : *sigh* I just hope she doesn't take everyone down with her.
Torbjörn : I bet my turret's a better shot than you! Widowmaker : And what are you willing to bet? Torbjörn : The Lindholm reputation! Widowmaker : How about your other eye?
Tracer : I have to work with you! Widowmaker : Babysitting is not part of my services. Tracer : That's a relief. Who'd trust you with a baby?!

Vendetta : I'm disappointed you left Talon behind, Amélie. You would have thrived under my rule. Widowmaker : I've given my life to Talon. I have no desire to serve another's vengeance. Vendetta : Mine was not the only revenge I would have chased. A shame you forfeited your chance to hunt by my side.
Vendetta : Glad to have you with me, Lacroix. You don't drag behind like the rest. Widowmaker : Do I look like I need your praise? Vendetta : No. And that's exactly why you've earned it.
map-specific: Why must our missions be in such woeful places? *sigh* At least I'll always have Paris .
I like it here. Perhaps I will stay...
Such poor manners for a guest.
At least you took the bullet this time. (eliminating Tracer while airborne)
This city is filthy, overrun by rats, and the people are terribly rude. Nothing like Paris.
